extensionDescription.message: HM fork: GitHub Gist sync + semi-auto upload/pull + manual sync (HarmonyOS-friendly).

uploadBookmarksDesc.message: Upload all the bookmarks of the local browser to the server

downloadBookmarksDesc.message: First clear the bookmarks in the local browser, and then download all the bookmarks on the server to the local browser

syncBookmarksDesc.message: Merge all the bookmarks on the server into the local browser, and then upload them to the server

removeAllBookmarksDesc.message: Remove All Bookmarks, Please backup first

autoUploadAfterChangeHint.message: Uploads about 4.5s after the last change. Clears local dirty flag on success; uses SyncDataInfo.createDate like the HM app.

autoPullIntervalHint.message: Pulls when remote createDate is newer and local has no pending upload; also runs once on browser startup. Requires alarms permission.

manualSyncBookmarksDesc.message: Compare Gist vs local (dirty + createDate): upload, download, or show up-to-date.

gistConfigIncomplete.message: Set GitHub Token, Gist ID, and file name in extension options first.

syncViaToolbarHint.message: Browsers do not allow buttons on the bookmarks bar. Use this extension icon (toolbar) — same row as the address bar on most layouts.

commandManualSync.message: Manual bookmark sync (same as HM app)

enableManualSyncHotkeyHint.message: Default: Alt+Shift+G. Change under chrome://extensions/shortcuts (Edge: edge://extensions/shortcuts). Uses the same logic as the HarmonyOS app toolbar sync.

enableFloatingSyncButton.message: Floating sync button on web pages

enableFloatingSyncButtonHint.message: Shows a small draggable-style control on http(s) pages only (not chrome://). Click ↻ to run manual sync; use » to dock to the right edge. Reload tabs after toggling if the button does not appear.

syncOnNewBookmark.message: Auto-upload when a new bookmark is added

syncOnNewBookmarkHint.message: Listens for the browser “bookmark added” event and queues the same debounced upload (4.5s) as other auto-sync. Works even if “Auto-upload after bookmark changes” is off. Editing/moving/removing still follow that option only.

showInPageSyncToastHint.message: After upload/pull/manual sync, shows a small banner on the active http(s) tab (icon + “uploaded/pulled/synced”). Independent of system notifications. Respects light/dark mode.
